message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve gastropub food and should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 12:00 on wednesday
If the booking fails how about 11:00
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 08:30
The train should be on the same day as the restaurant booking and should depart from broxbourne
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
